0.note: To properly work for other languages than English, the language of the chat template has to be adjusted! Copy this entry and replace 'chat_template_language' with the appropriate language code (e.g. 'HU' for Hungarian) and adjust the 'model_name' accordingly.

action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is: Put the sandwich on the side table, the book on the shelf and the mop in the cupboard.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a kitchen now. There are a plate, a counter and a cupboard. The plate is in the cupboard. The cupboard is closed. There are passages to a pantry, a living room and a hallway here.
action.label: context
